description: One view of your whole home's air health — radon, mold, particulates, CO2, VOC — aggregated from every sensor on your LAN, with a local history no single vendor app gives you.

tools.name: alerts_get
tools.description: Get all Alerts related to the user. Required: limit. Optional: offset, dismissed, beginTime (plus 1 more). Returns the ArrayOfAlert.

params.name: limit
params.description: The data amount of each query

params.name: offset
params.description: offset means this amount of rows were skipped before inquiring: pageSize * (pageIndex - 1)

params.name: dismissed
params.description: In default, all alerts will be collected. True/false corresponds to dismiss and checked alerts.

params.name: beginTime
params.description: Begin time (s)

params.name: endTime
params.description: End time (s)

tools.name: alerts_put-delete-all
tools.description: Delete all Alerts related to the user. Returns the Response. Destructive.

tools.name: alerts_put-dismiss-all
tools.description: Dismiss all Alerts related to the user. Returns the updated Response.

tools.name: devices_get
tools.description: Get the list of devices through Authorization. Returns array of UserDevice.

tools.name: devices_get-sn
tools.description: Get Hub details through Authorization and SN. Required: sn. Returns the Device.

params.name: sn
params.description: You can get the serial number of the Hub by calling the API that '/devices'

tools.name: nodes_get
tools.description: Get all Node related to the user. Returns array of Node.

tools.name: nodes_get-nodeid
tools.description: Get details of a Node related to the user. Required: node_id. Returns the Node.

params.name: node_id
params.description: You can get the id of the Node by calling the API that '/nodes'

tools.name: nodes_put
tools.description: Put. Required: node_id. Optional: info. Returns the updated Response.

params.name: node_id
params.description: You can get the Node id by calling the API that '/nodes'

params.name: info-humidity-calibration
params.description: Calibrated gap, 0 in default.

params.name: info-humidity-delay-before-alert
params.description: Time-delayed (s)

params.name: info-humidity-enable-alert
params.description: If the notification was enable.

params.name: info-humidity-max
params.description: Humidity max threshold for alert, The value of (value * 100)

params.name: info-humidity-min
params.description: Humidity min threshold for alert, The value of (value * 100)

params.name: info-temperature-calibration
params.description: Calibrated gap, 0 in default

params.name: info-temperature-delay-before-alert
params.description: Time-delayed (s)

params.name: info-temperature-enable-alert
params.description: If the notification was enable

params.name: info-temperature-max
params.description: Temperature max threshold for alert, The value of (value * 100), unit is (℃)

params.name: info-temperature-min
params.description: Temperature min threshold for alert, The value of (value * 100), unit is (℃)

tools.name: nodes_samples_delete-node
tools.description: Delete all the samples of this node. Required: node_id. Returns the Response. Destructive.

params.name: node_id
params.description: You can get the id of the Node by calling the API that '/nodes'

tools.name: nodes_samples_get-node
tools.description: Obtain all the samples of this node. Required: node_id, limit. Optional: offset, beginTime, endTime. Returns array of Record.

params.name: node_id
params.description: You can get the id of the Node by calling the API that '/nodes'

params.name: limit
params.description: The data amount of each query

params.name: offset
params.description: offset means this amount of rows were skipped before inquiring: pageSize * (pageIndex - 1)

params.name: beginTime
params.description: Begin time(s)

params.name: endTime
params.description: End time(s)

tools.name: oauth_post-refresh-token
tools.description: replace token. Optional: provider, refreshToken. Returns the new TokenResponse.

params.name: provider
params.description: Select the corresponding provider according to the product, Mocreo: mocreo, Syncsign: mrd

params.name: refreshToken
params.description: Refresh token

tools.name: oauth_post-token
tools.description: To get a token. This header value grants access to data resources. Optional: password, provider, username. Returns the new TokenResponse.

params.name: password
params.description: Password

params.name: provider
params.description: Select the corresponding provider according to the product, Mocreo: mocreo, Syncsign: mrd

params.name: username
params.description: Username

tools.name: user_get
tools.description: Get user information. Returns the User.
